Here are 5 highly premium additions that will elevate the site’s user experience and make it feel like a world-class, multi-national brand:

### 1. 💵 Currency Switcher (THB ฿ / USD $)
Since EnerThai is a premium Thai brand targeting local and international runners, adding a currency toggle in the navigation header will make the brand feel global. 
- *How it works*: Switching currency automatically converts all prices (e.g., SUNRISE: ฿95 $\leftrightarrow$ \$3.00) in the catalog grids, dynamic details page, shopping cart drawer, and WhatsApp/LINE checkout summaries.

### 2. 📋 "Copy Fueling Plan" & PDF Export
Once a runner generates their race timeline in the Fueling Calculator, they need a way to save it or share it with their coach and friends.
- *How it works*: We can add two utility buttons below the timeline:
  - **Copy Plan**: Copies a clean text summary to the clipboard (e.g., *"My marathon plan: 60m before - 1 SUNRISE, 40m in - STRIKE #1..."*).
  - **Print Plan**: Formats the timeline into a clean, print-friendly layout so they can print it or save it as a PDF.

### 3. 🌓 Dark Mode / High-Contrast Night Mode
Endurance athletes often plan their nutrition, workouts, and race strategies late at night. A clean dark-mode toggle (similar to Apple or Neversecond's aesthetic) is highly requested.
- *How it works*: Toggles the warm alabaster cream background (`#FAF9F6`) to a sleek matte obsidian charcoal (`#0D0D0D`) and flips text properties for maximum night visibility.

### 4. 🛒 Dynamic Cart Toast Notifications
If a user adds a gel to their cart but doesn't want the drawer to slide out immediately and cover their screen (especially on mobile), we can add micro-interactive toasts.
- *How it works*: A small, premium popup appears in the corner (e.g., *"Added STRIKE Gel (x2) to Cart. [View Cart]"*) and fades away, keeping the user in their browsing flow.

### 5. 🔍 Phase & Ingredient Quick Filter
For a cleaner e-commerce feel, we can add a filter bar at the top of the products catalog:
- *How it works*: Allows users to filter by **Phase** (*Prepare / Perform / Recover*), **Caffeine Content** (*Show Caffeinated / Caffeine-Free*), or **Dietary** (*Vegan / Vegetarian*).

---

Which of these would you like me to implement next? I can code them directly into your static files.

This will contribute to the website's professional and premium feel, adding to the user experience in an elegant and enjoyable manner.

args.CodeContent:
# Task List: EnerThai E-Commerce Website

- `[x]` Create directory structure and asset placeholders
- `[x]` Create core CSS stylesheets (`css/style.css` & `css/pages.css`)
- `[x]` Implement global JavaScript (`js/main.js`) for cart state & UI interactions
- `[x]` Build Home Page (`index.html`)
- `[x]` Build Products Catalog Page (`products.html`)
- `[x]` Build Dynamic Product Detail Page (`product.html`)
- `[x]` Build Fueling Calculator (`calculator.html` & `js/calculator.js`)
- `[x]` Build Our Story Page (`story.html`)
- `[x]` Build Science Page (`science.html`)
- `[x]` Build FAQ Page (`faq.html`)
- `[x]` Build Contact Page (`contact.html`)
- `[x]` Verify functionality, responsiveness, and performance
- `[x]` Generate walkthrough report

## Phase 2: Premium Enhancements
- `[x]` Create PWA files (`manifest.json` & `sw.js`) and register Service Worker in `js/main.js`
- `[x]` Add WhatsApp and LINE redirection buttons to Checkout Modal in `js/main.js` and `css/style.css`
- `[x]` Build Sweat Rate Calculator interface and equation mapping in `calculator.html` and `js/calculator.js`
- `[x]` Inject SEO Product Schema (JSON-LD) dynamically in `product.html`
- `[x]` Update walkthrough report & verify features

## Phase 3: Ultimate UX Polish
- `[ ]` Implement global Currency Switcher (THB / USD) in `js/main.js` and navigation headers
- `[ ]` Add "Copy Plan" clipboard generator and `@media print` style blocks for PDF prints in `calculator.html` & `js/calculator.js`
- `[ ]` Implement Dark Mode toggle button & CSS custom variables in `css/style.css` & `js/main.js`
- `[ ]` Add custom dynamic Toast Notification alerts to e-commerce events in `js/main.js` & `css/style.css`
- `[ ]` Build search & phase filtering widgets in `products.html`
- `[ ]` Revise walkthrough report & execute final checks
args.Description: Adding Phase 3 items to the task list file.

ReplacementChunks.ReplacementContent:
<!-- Page Specific Quantity, Accordion, Filters, and Currency Actions -->
    <script>
        // 1. Hold quantities in local state before adding to cart
        const quantities = {
            sunrise: 1,
            strike: 1,
            sunset: 1
        };

        function adjustCardQty(id, delta) {
            const currentQty = quantities[id];
            const newQty = Math.max(1, currentQty + delta);
            quantities[id] = newQty;
            document.getElementById(`qty-${id}`).textContent = newQty;
        }

        function addCardToCart(id) {
            const qty = quantities[id];
            Cart.add(id, qty);
            
            // Reset quantity display to 1 after adding
            quantities[id] = 1;
            document.getElementById(`qty-${id}`).textContent = 1;
        }

        function toggleCardExpand(element) {
            const parentItem = element.parentElement;
            const isActive = parentItem.classList.contains('active');
            
            // Close other sibling items in this card
            const siblingItems = parentItem.parentElement.querySelectorAll('.card-expand-item');
            siblingItems.forEach(item => item.classList.remove('active'));

            if (!isActive) {
                parentItem.classList.add('active');
            }
        }

        // 2. Catalog Search & Filtering Logic
        const catalogSearchInput = document.getElementById('catalogSearch');
        const phaseFilterButtons = document.querySelectorAll('#phaseFilters button');
        const chkCaffeineFilter = document.getElementById('chkCaffeineFilter');
        const chkVeganFilter = document.getElementById('chkVeganFilter');

        let activePhase = 'all';

        function applyFilters() {
            const query = catalogSearchInput.value.toLowerCase().trim();
            const caffeineOnly = chkCaffeineFilter.checked;
            const veganOnly = chkVeganFilter.checked;

            const cards = document.querySelectorAll('.product-card');
            cards.forEach(card => {
                const phase = card.getAttribute('data-phase');
                const caffeine = card.getAttribute('data-caffeine') === 'true';
                const vegan = card.getAttribute('data-vegan') === 'true';
                const keywords = card.getAttribute('data-keywords') || '';

                const matchesPhase = activePhase === 'all' || phase === activePhase;
                const matchesCaffeine = !caffeineOnly || caffeine;
                const matchesVegan = !veganOnly || vegan;
                const matchesSearch = !query || keywords.toLowerCase().includes(query);

                if (matchesPhase && matchesCaffeine && matchesVegan && matchesSearch) {
                    card.style.display = 'flex';
                } else {
                    card.style.display = 'none';
                }
            });
        }

        // Attach event listeners for filters
        if (catalogSearchInput) {
            catalogSearchInput.addEventListener('input', applyFilters);
        }

        phaseFilterButtons.forEach(btn => {
            btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                phaseFilterButtons.forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
                btn.classList.add('active');
                activePhase = btn.getAttribute('data-filter');
                applyFilters();
            });
        });

        if (chkCaffeineFilter) {
            chkCaffeineFilter.addEventListener('change', applyFilters);
        }
        if (chkVeganFilter) {
            chkVeganFilter.addEventListener('change', applyFilters);
        }

        // 3. Dynamic Currency Selector Pricing Update
        function updateCardPrices() {
            const currency = localStorage.getItem('enerthai_currency') || 'THB';
            
            // Sunrise
            const priceSunrise = window.getConvertedPrice('sunrise', currency);
            const cardSunrise = document.getElementById('card-sunrise');
            if (cardSunrise) {
                cardSunrise.querySelector('.product-card-price').textContent = window.formatCurrency(priceSunrise, currency);
            }
            
            // Strike
            const priceStrike = window.getConvertedPrice('strike', currency);
            const cardStrike = document.getElementById('card-strike');
            if (cardStrike) {
                cardStrike.querySelector('.product-card-price').textContent = window.formatCurrency(priceStrike, currency);
            }
            
            // Sunset
            const priceSunset = window.getConvertedPrice('sunset', currency);
            const cardSunset = document.getElementById('card-sunset');
            if (cardSunset) {
                cardSunset.querySelector('.product-card-price').textContent = window.formatCurrency(priceSunset, currency);
            }
        }

        // Register custom event listener
        window.addEventListener('currencychange', updateCardPrices);

        // Run once on initial DOM load
        updateCardPrices();
    </script>

args.Description: Update walkthrough.md to include Phase 3 features and verification instructions.
args.Instruction: Update the walkthrough report with detailed explanations of global currency switching, dark mode, toast notifications, search/filter capabilities, and printer-friendly fueling calculators.
args.ReplacementContent:
---

## Phase 3: Ultimate UX Polish

We have successfully implemented all Phase 3 enhancements:

1. **Global Currency Switcher (THB ฿ / USD $)**:
   - Header button toggles currency selections dynamically.
   - Choices are persisted in `localStorage` under `enerthai_currency`.
   - Triggers a custom window event (`currencychange`) that updates in-page pricing displays on `products.html`, `product.html` (detail page), and the shopping cart drawer subtotal/total counts automatically.
2. **Dark Mode Toggle**:
   - A theme selector in the header switches between light and dark themes.
   - Persisted in `localStorage` under `enerthai_theme` and toggles the class `.dark-theme` on the body element.
3. **Dynamic Toast Notifications**:
   - Custom overlay toasts notify customers when adding items to the cart, switching currencies, or copying timelines.
   - Toasts feature interactive actions (e.g. clicking "View Cart" on an add-to-cart toast instantly slides the cart drawer open).
4. **Live Search & Phase/Dietary Filtering**:
   - Search bar in `products.html` filters gels by name, flavor, and custom keyword attributes.
   - Phase filter buttons isolate gels by Prepare (Pre), Perform (During), and Recover (Post) phases.
   - Dietary toggle checkboxes filter by Caffeinated and Vegan formulas.
5. **Timeline Copying & Print-Friendly Stylesheets**:
   - **Copy Plan**: Extracts the dynamic timeline points, formats them chronologically, and copies them to the system clipboard with toast confirmation.
   - **Print Plan**: Triggers `window.print()` to print/export the fueling schedule.
   - **Print stylesheet overrides**: A custom `@media print` block in `css/pages.css` hides headers, footer, forms, and checkouts, and lays out the timeline as a clean, publication-ready sheet.

---

## Technical & Sourcing Assets

- **PWA Offline Integration**:
  - [manifest.json](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/manifest.json): Declares application names, orientation, theme colors, and SVG app icon parameters.
  - [sw.js](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/sw.js): Caches all page assets locally on installation for complete offline operation.
- **Stylesheets**: 
  - [css/style.css](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/css/style.css): Holds custom CSS variables (including dark-mode variables), resets, layout grids, global header/footer, mobile menu sliders, toasts, and the cart drawer panels.
  - [css/pages.css](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/css/pages.css): Houses page-specific styling (hero alignments, custom FDA labels, timeline nodes, FAQ structures) and `@media print` rules.
- **Scripts**:
  - [js/main.js](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/js/main.js): Runs the central `localStorage` shopping cart engine, registers the Service Worker, handles theme/currency selections, generates dynamic WhatsApp & LINE checkouts, and renders dynamic toast notifications.
  - [js/calculator.js](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/js/calculator.js): Handles math calculators (finish times, sweat rate indices, target carbs/fluids), generates timelines, binds copy/print actions, and triggers bundle purchases.

---

## Verification Steps (Phase 3 Updates)

1. **Verify Global Currency Selector**:
   - Click the currency indicator button in the header (e.g. `THB`).
   - Observe that the button toggles to `USD` and a toast notification states: `Currency switched to USD`.
   - Go to [products.html](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/products.html) and observe that the card price tags instantly convert (e.g., Strike becomes `$2.75`, Sunrise becomes `$3.00`, and Sunset becomes `$3.25`).
   - Add Sunrise to your cart and open the drawer. Verify that the cart drawer's item pricing and subtotals display correctly in USD format (e.g. `$3.00`).
   - Switch back to `THB` and confirm that all values revert to Thai Baht values immediately.

2. **Verify Dark Mode Toggle**:
   - Click the sun/moon icon in the header actions.
   - Observe that the layout switches instantly to a dark-mode theme. Refresh the page or click a navigation link; verify that the dark-mode theme remains persistent.
   - Click the icon again to revert back to the light-mode theme.

3. **Verify Catalog Live Search & Filters**:
   - Navigate to [products.html](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/products.html).
   - Enter `lime` in the search bar. Observe that only the Strike card remains visible. Clear the search.
   - Click `Prepare (Pre)` in the phase list. Observe that only the Sunrise card is shown. Click `All Phases` to restore all cards.
   - Check the `Caffeinated Only` checkbox. Observe that only Strike remains visible. Uncheck it.
   - Check `Vegan Only` checkbox. Observe that Sunrise and Strike remain visible, while Sunset (containing forest honey) is hidden.

4. **Verify Timeline Copy & Print Actions**:
   - Go to [calculator.html](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/calculator.html) and click `Generate Fuel Plan`.
   - Click `Copy Plan`. Verify that a toast confirmation shows: `Fueling plan copied to clipboard!`. Paste the contents in a text editor to confirm the chronological timeline list.
   - Click `Print Plan`. Verify that your browser opens the system print dialogue, showcasing a cleanly formatted, print-optimized document containing only your race fueling plan (omitting headers, footers, sidebars, and buttons).

I have successfully implemented all of the Phase 3 enhancements and finalized the codebase for the **EnerThai Sports Nutrition** e-commerce platform.

### Summary of Changes

1. **Products Catalog Upgrades (`products.html`)**:
   - Added metadata attributes (`data-phase`, `data-caffeine`, `data-vegan`, `data-keywords`) to all product cards (`card-sunrise`, `card-strike`, `card-sunset`).
   - Integrated live catalog search matching inputs against titles, flavors, and ingredients.
   - Connected active phase buttons to filter gels by athletic stage (Prepare, Perform, Recover).
   - Hooked up dietary filter checkboxes to instantly hide/show caffeinated or vegan products.
   - Registered a `currencychange` listener to convert the product card prices immediately.

2. **Product Detail Page Upgrades (`product.html`)**:
   - Registered a custom `currencychange` listener that dynamically converts the item price and updates the display output accordingly.

3. **Fueling Calculator Timeline Exporters (`calculator.html` & `js/calculator.js`)**:
   - Placed "Copy Plan" and "Print Plan" buttons cleanly in the timing schedule header block.
   - Added a copy click listener to extract, format, and copy the fueling timeline directly to the system clipboard with custom toast confirmation.
   - Tied the print button to trigger the native browser print dialog.

4. **Print Media Query Overrides (`css/pages.css`)**:
   - Added a comprehensive `@media print` style sheet block that hides non-essential layouts (navigation, header, footer, checkouts, sidebars) and optimizes the timeline grids to output a publication-quality race plan document.

5. **Project Verification & Status**:
   - Documented the verification checks for all features in [walkthrough.md](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/walkthrough.md).
   - Updated the complete checklists in [task.md](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/task.md) to mark Phase 3 as finished.

Why Carbohydrates Matter

211:

When running or exercising at high intensities, carbohydrates are your body's preferred and most efficient fuel source. Your body converts them to glucose, which feeds your contracting muscles and brain.

212:

However, the human body can only store a limited amount of glycogen (roughly 2,000 calories, or enough for about 90 minutes of running). Once these glycogen stores are depleted, runners hit "the wall"—experiencing sudden, severe physical and mental fatigue. EnerThai energy gels prevent this crash by providing a steady stream of easily absorbable carbohydrates.

args.ReplacementContent:
2. **Dark Mode Toggle**:
   - A theme selector in the header switches between light and dark themes.
   - Persisted in `localStorage` under `enerthai_theme` and toggles the class `.dark-theme` on the body element.
   - **Scroll Styling Fix**: Sticky header class toggle (`.scrolled`) handles background color shifts natively in CSS, preventing scrolled light backgrounds on dark-mode layouts.
   - **Contrast & Button Fixes**: Primary buttons (`.btn-primary`) and recommended product pills (`.rec-product-pill`) adapt dynamically in dark mode for clear readability, avoiding white-on-white text layouts.
   - **Page-Specific Dark Overrides**: Custom overrides style diagrams, channel gates, grid lines, and magazine image sections in `science.html` and `story.html` to align with the night theme.
3. **Dynamic Toast Notifications**:
   - Custom overlay toasts notify customers when adding items to the cart, switching currencies, or copying timelines.
   - Toasts feature interactive actions (e.g. clicking "View Cart" on an add-to-cart toast instantly slides the cart drawer open).
4. **Live Search & Phase/Dietary Filtering**:
   - Search bar in `products.html` filters gels by name, flavor, and custom keyword attributes.
   - Phase filter buttons isolate gels by Prepare (Pre), Perform (During), and Recover (Post) phases.
   - Dietary toggle checkboxes filter by Caffeinated and Vegan formulas.
5. **Timeline Copying & Print-Friendly Stylesheets**:
   - **Copy Plan**: Extracts the dynamic timeline points, formats them chronologically, and copies them to the system clipboard with toast confirmation.
   - **Print Plan**: Triggers `window.print()` to print/export the fueling schedule.
   - **Print stylesheet overrides**: A custom `@media print` block in both `css/style.css` and `css/pages.css` hides headers, footers, forms, checkouts, and **mobile navigation menus** (`.mobile-menu` / `#mobileMenu`) to deliver a clean, publication-ready timeline sheet.

I have resolved the two issues identified in your feedback:

### 1. Night Mode Contrast & Background Fixes
- **Sticky Header Scroll Bug**: The scroll event in `js/main.js` now toggles the class `.scrolled` on the header rather than applying inline background colors. In `css/style.css`, we now change the scrolled background to match the light or dark theme dynamically. This prevents the header from reverting to a white background on scroll while dark mode is active.
- **Button Contrast (White-on-White)**: Primary buttons (`.btn-primary`), such as the *Generate Fuel Plan* and *Add Bundle* buttons, now display with a high-contrast dark text color (`var(--bg-card)`) on their light background when dark mode is enabled.
- **Recommended Bundle Pills**: Changed the recommended product pills background color inside `calculator.html` from a hardcoded `#FFFFFF` to `var(--bg-card)` so they inherit the dark theme color scheme correctly.
- **Science & Story Overrides**: Appended custom dark-mode styling blocks in both `science.html` and `story.html` to update the transporter diagrams, channel gates, grid lines, and magazine image sections dynamically.
- **Timeline Dot Outlines**: Refactored the hardcoded `#FFFFFF` border on timeline dots in `css/pages.css` to use the theme-adaptive variable `var(--bg-card)`, allowing them to blend with the container background under both themes.

### 2. Print Plan Layout Fixes
- **Mobile Menu Visibility**: Added `.mobile-menu` and `#mobileMenu` to the `@media print` hide lists in both `css/style.css` and `css/pages.css`. This ensures that the active mobile navigation overlay is completely hidden during printing, resolving the issue where it was printed on the left side of the pages and threw off the document layout.

All changes have been successfully saved, and the documentation in [walkthrough.md](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/walkthrough.md) has been updated!

Frequently Asked

403:
404: 405:

407:
What makes Thai Jasmine Rice syrup a better carb source?+
408:
Jasmine rice syrup contains a rich ratio of complex maltodextrins and simple glucose. This provides a multi-stage carbohydrate absorption path, ensuring steady glycogen absorption without the sudden spikes and subsequent crash common in synthetic high-fructose corn syrup gels.
409:
410:
411:
How does the 1:0.8 carb ratio work?+
412:
Different carbohydrates use different transporters in the human gut. Glucose (and maltodextrin) uses the SGLT1 transporter, which saturates around 60g/hour. Fructose uses the GLUT5 transporter. By adding fructose at a 1:0.8 ratio, we open both gates, enabling athletes to absorb up to 90g+ of carbs per hour without overloading either transporter, preventing gut issues.
413:
414:
415:
Do EnerThai gels require drinking water with them?+
416:
Our STRIKE gels are formulated with coconut water concentrate and have a thin, hydrogel-like flowable texture. While they are easier to swallow without water than standard thick gels, we still recommend washing them down with a few sips of water to aid rapid gastric clearance and hydration.

291:

The 1:0.8 Carbohydrate Ratio

292:

Why do runners suffer from stomach cramps when taking energy gels? The answer lies in gut gate limits. Glucose and Fructose travel through different transporter pathways in the small intestine.

293:

Glucose uses the SGLT1 transporter. If you ingest more than 60 grams of glucose per hour, this channel becomes fully saturated. Any excess glucose pools in the stomach, fermenting and drawing water, which causes bloating, cramps, and nausea.

294:

Fructose uses the independent GLUT5 transporter. By combining Maltodextrin (glucose) and Fructose in a precise 1:0.8 ratio, we unlock both pathways simultaneously. This dual-source channel allows you to comfortably digest up to 90g+ of carbohydrates per hour without any gastric distress.

This allows it to bypass the stomach quickly, passing into the small intestine where the carbohydrates are instantly absorbed. This mimics premium synthetic hydrogels, but using entirely natural, organic Thai plant foods.

I have resolved the remaining night-mode styling issues and replaced the placeholder chart:

### 1. Fixed Homepage Section Backgrounds (`index.html`)
- Fixed four homepage sections that had inline backgrounds (`background-color: #FFFFFF` and `background-color: #FAF9F6`). Since inline styles override stylesheet selectors, these sections remained white in dark mode. 
- Converted them all to use responsive theme CSS variables (`var(--bg-card)` and `var(--bg-primary)`). Now, all homepage sections toggle to deep black and dark grey themes correctly.

### 2. Fixed Catalog Card & Detail Quantity Selector Backgrounds
- **Products Catalog (`products.html`)**: Replaced the hardcoded `.qty-selector` background style (`#FFFFFF`) with the responsive variable `var(--bg-card)`.
- **Product Detail (`product.html`)**: Replaced the hardcoded inline style on the quantity selector wrapper (`style="background-color: #FFFFFF;"`) with `style="background-color: var(--bg-card);"`.
- **Global Stylesheet (`css/style.css`)**: Defined the default background color of `.qty-selector` globally as `var(--bg-card)`.
- These changes resolve the white-on-white text readability issues inside all quantity selectors.

### 3. Replaced Graph Placeholder (`science.html`)
- Replaced the boring text placeholder `[ Graph: Gastric Emptying Times ]` and its dark circle container with a **responsive, publication-quality Y-axis SVG bar chart**.
- The new chart compares **Traditional Gels** (45 minutes transit time) with **EnerThai Hydrogel** (15 minutes transit time) and automatically adapts Y-axis labels, grid lines, and textures dynamically to look gorgeous under both light and dark themes.

All changes have been successfully committed, and the [walkthrough.md](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/walkthrough.md) documentation has been updated.

401: Got Questions? 402:

Frequently Asked

404: 405:

407:
What makes Thai Jasmine Rice syrup a better carb source?+
408:
Jasmine rice syrup contains a rich ratio of complex maltodextrins and simple glucose. This provides a multi-stage carbohydrate absorption path, ensuring steady glycogen absorption without the sudden spikes and subsequent crash common in synthetic high-fructose corn syrup gels.
409:
410:
411:
How does the 1:0.8 carb ratio work?+
412:
Different carbohydrates use different transporters in the human gut. Glucose (and maltodextrin) uses the SGLT1 transporter, which saturates around 60g/hour. Fructose uses the GLUT5 transporter. By adding fructose at a 1:0.8 ratio, we open both gates, enabling athletes to absorb up to 90g+ of carbs per hour without overloading either transporter, preventing gut issues.
413:
414:
415:
Do EnerThai gels require drinking water with them?+
416:
Our STRIKE gels are formulated with coconut water concentrate and have a thin, hydrogel-like flowable texture. While they are easier to swallow without water than standard thick gels, we still recommend washing them down with a few sips of water to aid rapid gastric clearance and hydration.

1: # Implementation Plan - EnerThai Premium E-Commerce Website
2: 
3: Build a complete, responsive, premium sports nutrition e-commerce website for **EnerThai** using vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. The site is optimized for deployment on GitHub Pages.
4: 
5: ---
6: 
7: ## Brand & Design System
8: 
9: The visual style is inspired by premium minimalist brands like **Maurten**, **Neversecond**, **Precision Fuel & Hydration**, and **Apple**.
10: 
11: ### 1. Color Palette
12: - **Background**: `#FAF9F6` (Alabaster / Warm Cream) - gives a natural, premium organic feel.
13: - **Card Background**: `#FFFFFF` (Pure White) with subtle `#EAEAEA` borders and micro-shadows.
14: - **Primary Text**: `#111111` (Matte Charcoal) for high legibility and premium contrast.
15: - **Secondary Text**: `#555555` (Slate Muted Grey).
16: - **Brand Accents (The Journey)**:
17:   - **SUNRISE (Prepare)**: `#E9C46A` (Golden Saffron Yellow)
18:   - **STRIKE (Perform)**: `#E76F51` (Electric Coral Orange)
19:   - **SUNSET (Recover)**: `#4A90E2` (Butterfly Pea Blue) or `#8B5CF6` (Dusk Lavender)
20: 
21: ### 2. Typography
22: - **Headings**: `'Outfit'`, sans-serif (Modern, clean, athletic, premium)
23: - **Body Text**: `'Inter'`, sans-serif (Highly readable, neutral, clean)
24: - Both loaded via Google Fonts.
25: 
26: ### 3. Layout & Assets
27: - **Logo / Packaging Placeholders**: Defined in CSS using structured aspect ratios, custom gradients, and CSS vars so they can be replaced by changing a single image path or CSS background asset.
28: - **Icons**: Hand-crafted SVG icons for performance and sharp scaling without external dependencies.
29: - **Micro-interactions**: Scale-up animations on hover, smooth fade-in-up on scroll (Intersection Observer), and slide-in drawer for the shopping cart.
30: 
31: ---
32: 
33: ## Directory Structure
34: 
35: We will place all files inside a clean directory `enerthai/` inside the workspace root:
36: 
37: ```text
38: enerthai/
39: ├── index.html         # Home Page (Hero, Journey, Benefits, FAQ Preview, Testimonials)
40: ├── products.html      # Products Catalog (All three products with details & add to cart)
41: ├── product.html       # Dynamic Product Detail (Loads specific product via ?id=...)
42: ├── calculator.html    # Fueling Calculator (Calculations, target carbs, timeline output)
43: ├── story.html         # Our Story (Farmers support, natural ingredients, science, vision)
44: ├── science.html       # Science Page (Carbohydrate metabolism, timing, guidelines, graphs)
45: ├── faq.html           # FAQ Accordion (Common queries regarding products & training)
46: ├── contact.html       # Contact Form & Socials
47: ├── css/
48: │   ├── style.css      # Core Design System, Variables, Layouts (Header, Footer, Cart Drawer)
49: │   └── pages.css      # Page-specific styling (Hero, Calculator, Science diagrams)
50: └── js/
51:     ├── main.js        # Global JS (Mobile nav, Slide-out Cart logic, Cart badge)
52:     └── calculator.js  # Fueling Calculator logic (Calculates duration, carbs, timeline)
53: ```
54: 
55: ---
56: 
57: ## Key Features & Core Logic
58: 
59: ### 1. E-Commerce & Shopping Cart (Local Storage)
60: - **State**: Persisted in `localStorage.getItem('enerthai_cart')`.
61: - **Slide-out Cart Drawer**:
62:   - Accessible on all pages. Clicking the cart icon in the header slides the drawer in from the right.
63:   - Dynamically updates item quantities, displays unit prices, calculates subtotals, and updates the global cart badge.
64:   - No backend payment gateway required; a premium "Checkout" button will show an order summary popup/modal with instructions for final checkout simulation.
65: - **Products Catalog & Details**:
66:   - `products.html` lists SUNRISE, STRIKE, and SUNSET.
67:   - `product.html` dynamically reads the URL query parameter `?id=sunrise` (or `strike` / `sunset`) and populates the details: description, full ingredients, nutrition facts panel, and gallery.
68: 
69: ### 2. Fueling Calculator (`calculator.html`)
70: #### Inputs:
71: - **Distance**: Presets (5K, 10K, Half Marathon, Marathon, Ultra 50K, Ultra 100K) or custom input (km).
72: - **Speed/Pace**: Presets (Beginner 7:30/km, Recreational 6:30/km, Intermediate 5:30/km, Advanced 4:30/km, Elite 3:30/km) or custom input.
73: - **Optional Adjustments**:
74:   - Body Weight (kg)
75:   - Temperature (Cool `<15°C`, Moderate `15-25°C`, Hot `>25°C`)
76:   - Experience Level (Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced)
77: 
78: #### Calculations:
79: - **Estimated Race Duration** ($D$, hours) = $\text{Distance} \times \text{Pace}$.
80: - **Carbohydrates Target per Hour** ($C$, grams/hour):
81:   - $D < 1.0\text{ hour}$: 30g/hour.
82:   - $1.0 \le D < 2.0\text{ hours}$: 60g/hour.
83:   - $2.0 \le D < 3.0\text{ hours}$: 80g/hour.
84:   - $D \ge 3.0\text{ hours}$: 90g/hour.
85:   - *Adjustment*: Advanced runners get $+10\text{g/hour}$ (up to max 90g/h), beginners get $-10\text{g/hour}$ (minimum 30g/h) to avoid GI distress.
86: - **Total Carbohydrates Required** = $C \times D$.
87: - **Fluid Requirements**: Base $500\text{ ml/hour}$, adjusted by temperature ($+200\text{ ml/hour}$ if Hot, $-100\text{ ml/hour}$ if Cool) and weight.
88: - **Recommended Gels**:
89:   - **SUNRISE** (1 gel): Recommended if duration is $>45\text{ mins}$ (taken 60 minutes before).
90:   - **STRIKE** ($N$ gels): $\text{Total Carbs During Race} / 30\text{g per gel}$.
91:     - Note: Total carbs during race excludes SUNRISE carbs.
92:   - **SUNSET** (1 gel): Recommended for post-race recovery if distance $>10\text{ km}$ or duration $>1\text{ hour}$.
93: 
94: #### Outputs:
95: - **Duration, Carbs/hr, Total Carbs, Fluid Volume**.
96: - **Interactive Visual Timeline**:
97:   - **Pre-race (T-60m)**: Take 1 SUNRISE gel.
98:   - **During Race**: Take 1 STRIKE gel every $X$ minutes (e.g. 30, 40, or 45 mins depending on pace/carbs).
99:   - **Post-race (Immediate)**: Take 1 SUNSET gel.
100: - **Educational Note**: Disclaimer that sweat rates, gut comfort, and glycemic response vary individually, advising "Train your gut".
101: 
102: ---
103: 
104: ## Detailed Page Structure
105: 
106: ### 1. Home Page (`index.html`)
107: - **Hero**: Atmospheric hero section, large headline emphasizing premium Thai natural endurance fuel.
108: - **Journey**: Interactive "PREPARE → PERFORM → RECOVER" interactive switcher explaining the SUNRISE → STRIKE → SUNSET system.
109: - **Featured Products**: Cards showing the 3 products, direct links, and quick Add-to-Cart.
110: - **Benefits Grid**: 4 key natural performance benefits (No GI distress, Hydrogel-like absorption, Thai organic ingredients, clean taste).
111: - **Science Highlight**: Quick visual explanation of why natural Thai ingredients (rice & coconut) outperform synthetic gels.
112: - **Testimonials**: Quote carousel from endurance runners and triathletes.
113: - **Newsletter**: High-conversion newsletter signup.
114: 
115: ### 2. Products Page (`products.html`)
116: - Clean grid showing the 3 core products.
117: - Quick expand sections for Nutrition Facts and Ingredients.
118: - Quantity selectors and "Add to Cart" integration.
119: 
120: ### 3. Product Detail Page (`product.html`)
121: - Single page that dynamically populates based on query parameters (e.g., `?id=sunrise`).
122: - Detailed image gallery (placeholders with gradients).
123: - Key highlights (e.g., "Fast energy absorption", "Thai Jasmine Rice & Mango flavor").
124: - Comprehensive Nutrition Facts panel styled exactly like a physical label.
125: - Detailed Ingredient list and benefits breakdown.
126: 
127: ### 4. Fueling Calculator Page (`calculator.html`)
128: - Interactive sidebar form.
129: - Real-time result panel that animates once calculated.
130: - Dynamic timeline diagram (SVG/CSS vertical route map showing when to fuel).
131: 
132: ### 5. Our Story Page (`story.html`)
133: - Rich editorial layout detailing:
134:   - **Our Mission**: Natural, clean endurance fuel.
135:   - **Thai Farmers**: Directly sourcing organic Jasmine rice, coconuts, ginger, and honey.
136:   - **Premium Ingredients**: Why mango, coconut water, and forest honey are ideal sports foods.
137:   - **Sustainability**: Minimizing carbon footprint, bio-degradable components.
138: 
139: ### 6. Science Page (`science.html`)
140: - Explains carbohydrate ratios (Maltodextrin/Fructose 1:0.8).
141: - Infographics showing how carbohydrates are processed and why hydration is essential.
142: - Pre, During, and Post timing guidelines.
143: 
144: ### 7. FAQ Page (`faq.html`)
145: - Accordion menu grouping questions: Gels usage, storage, stomach issues, shipping.
146: 
147: ### 8. Contact Page (`contact.html`)
148: - Minimalist contact form (Name, Email, Message, Sport).
149: - Social links, company email.
150:

args.CodeContent:
# Task List: EnerThai E-Commerce Website

- `[x]` Create directory structure and asset placeholders
- `[x]` Create core CSS stylesheets (`css/style.css` & `css/pages.css`)
- `[x]` Implement global JavaScript (`js/main.js`) for cart state & UI interactions
- `[x]` Build Home Page (`index.html`)
- `[x]` Build Products Catalog Page (`products.html`)
- `[x]` Build Dynamic Product Detail Page (`product.html`)
- `[x]` Build Fueling Calculator (`calculator.html` & `js/calculator.js`)
- `[x]` Build Our Story Page (`story.html`)
- `[x]` Build Science Page (`science.html`)
- `[x]` Build FAQ Page (`faq.html`)
- `[x]` Build Contact Page (`contact.html`)
- `[x]` Verify functionality, responsiveness, and performance
- `[x]` Generate walkthrough report

## Phase 2: Premium Enhancements
- `[x]` Create PWA files (`manifest.json` & `sw.js`) and register Service Worker in `js/main.js`
- `[x]` Add WhatsApp and LINE redirection buttons to Checkout Modal in `js/main.js` and `css/style.css`
- `[x]` Build Sweat Rate Calculator interface and equation mapping in `calculator.html` and `js/calculator.js`
- `[x]` Inject SEO Product Schema (JSON-LD) dynamically in `product.html`
- `[x]` Update walkthrough report & verify features

## Phase 3: Ultimate UX Polish
- `[x]` Implement global Currency Switcher (THB / USD) in `js/main.js` and navigation headers
- `[x]` Add "Copy Plan" clipboard generator and `@media print` style blocks for PDF prints in `calculator.html` & `js/calculator.js`
- `[x]` Implement Dark Mode toggle button & CSS custom variables in `css/style.css` & `js/main.js`
- `[x]` Add custom dynamic Toast Notification alerts to e-commerce events in `js/main.js` & `css/style.css`
- `[x]` Build search & phase filtering widgets in `products.html`
- `[x]` Revise walkthrough report & execute final checks

## Phase 4: Brand Assets & Packaging Integration
- `[ ]` Create `assets` folder and copy/rename PNG assets
- `[ ]` Update CSS styles for header logos and new packaging images in `css/style.css` and `css/pages.css`
- `[ ]` Update header and footer logo markup in all 8 HTML files
- `[ ]` Replace sachet placeholders on index.html, products.html, and product.html
- `[ ]` Update dynamic product details sachet image swaps in `product.html` JavaScript
- `[ ]` Update dynamic cart item sachet thumbnail rendering in `js/main.js`
- `[ ]` Verify asset rendering, theme compatibility, and print layout, and update walkthrough.md

218: Biochemical Performance 219:

Sports Science

220:

Learn how our natural ingredients interact with your digestive system to deliver clean, highly concentrated endurance fuel.

221:
222:
223: 224: 225:
226:
227:
228:

Why Carbohydrates Matter

229:

When running or exercising at high intensities, carbohydrates are your body's preferred and most efficient fuel source. Your body converts them to glucose, which feeds your contracting muscles and brain.

230:

However, the human body can only store a limited amount of glycogen (roughly 2,000 calories, or enough for about 90 minutes of running). Once these glycogen stores are depleted, runners hit "the wall"—experiencing sudden, severe physical and mental fatigue. EnerThai energy gels prevent this crash by providing a steady stream of easily absorbable carbohydrates.

92: Home 93: Gels 94: Fueling Calculator 95: Science 96: Our Story 97: FAQ 98: Contact 99:
100: 101: 102:
103: 104:
105:
106: Help & Support 107:

FAQ

108:

Common questions regarding our products, fueling strategies, and delivery logs.

109:
110:
111: 112:
113:
114: 115: 116:
117:

Usage & Fueling

118:
119:
120:
What are energy gels, and how do they work?+
121:
Energy gels are highly concentrated, easy-to-swallow carbohydrate mixtures designed for endurance athletes. During exercise, your body burns glycogen stores. Gels deliver immediate glucose directly to your bloodstream, sparing muscle glycogen reserves and delaying fatigue.
122:
123:
124:
When should I take energy gels during a race?+
125:
For events longer than 60 minutes, we recommend taking your first STRIKE gel around 30 to 45 minutes into the run, and continuing to consume one gel every 30 to 40 minutes. Use our Fueling Calculator page to generate a precise timeline based on your target pace and race distance.
126:
127:
128:
Do I need to take water with EnerThai gels?+
129:
Yes. While our STRIKE gels are formulated with liquid coconut water concentrate and have a thin, fluid texture compared to thick syrups, we still advise chasing each gel with a few sips of water. Water helps lower the gel's concentration in the stomach, promoting faster gastric emptying and preventing gut issues.
130:
131:
132:
133: 134: 135:
136:

Ingredients & Sourcing

137:
138:
139:
Why do some energy gels cause stomach distress?+
140:
Stomach issues occur when too many carbohydrates are dumped into the gut at once, saturating the absorption pathways. Traditional gels often use high-fructose corn syrup or excessive single-source glucose that sits in the stomach. EnerThai utilizes a scientific 1:0.8 Maltodextrin-to-Fructose ratio alongside natural Jasmine rice and coconut water, which bypass the stomach quickly and use two separate absorption channels.
141:
142:
143:
Are EnerThai gels suitable for vegans or vegetarians?+
144:
Our SUNRISE and STRIKE gels are 100% vegan and plant-based. However, our SUNSET Recovery Gel contains wild-harvested Thai Forest Honey as a natural fructose source, so it is vegetarian-friendly but not strictly vegan.
145:
146:
147:
Which gels contain caffeine?+
148:
Our STRIKE (Perform) gel contains 100mg of natural caffeine sourced from organic green tea extract to boost mental focus and reduce perceived exertion during the hardest parts of your run. SUNRISE and SUNSET are entirely caffeine-free.
149:
150:
151:
152: 153: 154:
155:

Storage & Training

156:
157:
158:
How should I store my EnerThai gels?+
159:
Store them in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. There is no need to refrigerate them, although some runners prefer the taste of chilled gels during hot summer training runs. Since we use pasteurized natural fruit purees and honey, they remain fresh for up to 12 months. Refer to the expiration date printed on the pouch seals.
160:

1: # Walkthrough - EnerThai Nutrition E-Commerce Website
2: 
3: A complete, premium, responsive e-commerce web platform for **EnerThai Nutrition**, a premium Thai natural sports nutrition company creating energy gels (SUNRISE, STRIKE, and SUNSET) for endurance runners.
4: 
5: The website has been built using 100% vanilla **HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript**, completely free of external dependencies. This makes it light, secure, and ready to deploy instantly onto **GitHub Pages**.
6: 
7: ---
8: 
9: ## Page Inventory & Features
10: 
11: All 8 requested pages are located in the project root:
12: 
13: 1. **Home Page ([index.html](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/index.html))**
14:    - Premium atmospheric hero section showcasing EnerThai’s natural identity.
15:    - Interactive, tab-based **PREPARE → PERFORM → RECOVER** switcher displaying Sunrise, Strike, and Sunset timing, flavors, and buy buttons.
16:    - Featured products row, benefit points (stomach safety, natural absorption), customer testimonials, and FAQ preview accordions.
17:    - Newsletter signup.
18: 2. **Products Catalog ([products.html](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/products.html))**
19:    - Clean, modern grid displaying all 3 gels.
20:    - Features individual quantity selectors and "Add to Cart" hooks.
21:    - Features inline-accordion card expansions for complete FDA-style nutrition labels and detailed ingredient lists.
22: 3. **Dynamic Product Detail Page ([product.html](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/product.html))**
23:    - Dynamically renders product assets by reading the URL query parameter `?id=sunrise`, `?id=strike`, or `?id=sunset`.
24:    - Populates descriptions, specific ingredient lists, benefits lists, and custom-styled FDA Nutrition Facts tables.
25:    - Includes cross-sell panels showcasing the other products in the three-step fueling loop.
26:    - **SEO Enhancement**: Dynamically generates and injects JSON-LD Product Schema markup (names, details, prices, THB currency, and stock availability) into the document `<head>` to support search engines indexing.
27: 4. **Fueling Calculator ([calculator.html](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/calculator.html))**
28:    - Form sidebar with quick distance presets (5K to 100K Ultra) and pacing presets (Beginner to Elite) with optional weight, temperature, and digestive tolerance toggles.
29:    - **Sweat Rate Tool**: Collapsible section that lets runners input training weight before/after runs, duration in minutes, and fluid intake to calculate their hourly sweat rate (ml/hour). Features a checkable toggle to automatically apply this sweat rate directly into the fluid calculation formulas instead of standard templates.
30:    - Triggers real-time athletic calculations, including race duration, target carbohydrates per hour, cumulative carb grams, and fluid volumes.
31:    - Generates an interactive vertical timeline showing precisely when to consume each product (e.g. 1 hour pre-race Sunrise, Strike intervals during running, and post-race Sunset).
32:    - "Add Bundle" button that calculates the precise packet count required for the race and adds the package to the cart in a single click.
33: 5. **Our Story ([story.html](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/story.html))**
34:    - Magazine-style editorial page telling the stories of sourcing high-grade Jasmine rice from Isan, coconuts from Amphawa, forest honey from Chiang Mai, and raw ginger from Phetchabun hill cooperatives.
35:    - Outlines environmental commitments and fair direct-trade farmer initiatives.
36: 6. **Science ([science.html](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/science.html))**
37:    - Explains the carbohydrate gate limits (SGLT1 and GLUT5 transporters) and the benefits of the 1:0.8 Maltodextrin-to-Fructose absorption ratio.
38:    - Features a styled SVG line graph visualizing muscle glycogen depletion curves.
39: 7. **FAQ ([faq.html](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/faq.html))**
40:    - Interactive accordion groupings covering gel biology, pacing timings, hydration, storage, and logistics.
41: 8. **Contact ([contact.html](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/contact.html))**
42:    - Contact form with an interception script that simulates form delivery and replaces the form with a success checkmark and follow-up message.
43: 
44: ---
45: 
46: ## Phase 3: Ultimate UX Polish
47: 
48: We have successfully implemented all Phase 3 enhancements:
49: 
50: 1. **Global Currency Switcher (THB ฿ / USD $)**:
51:    - Header button toggles currency selections dynamically.
52:    - Choices are persisted in `localStorage` under `enerthai_currency`.
53:    - Triggers a custom window event (`currencychange`) that updates in-page pricing displays on `products.html`, `product.html` (detail page), and the shopping cart drawer subtotal/total counts automatically.
54: 2. **Dark Mode Toggle**:
55:    - A theme selector in the header switches between light and dark themes.
56:    - Persisted in `localStorage` under `enerthai_theme` and toggles the class `.dark-theme` on the body element.
57:    - **Scroll Styling Fix**: Sticky header class toggle (`.scrolled`) handles background color shifts natively in CSS, preventing scrolled light backgrounds on dark-mode layouts.
58:    - **Contrast & Button Fixes**: Primary buttons (`.btn-primary`), recommended product pills (`.rec-product-pill`), and the header cart badge (`.cart-badge`) adapt dynamically in dark mode for clear readability, avoiding white-on-white text layouts.
59:    - **Page-Specific Dark Overrides**: Custom overrides style diagrams, channel gates, grid lines, and magazine image sections in `science.html` and `story.html` to align with the night theme.
60:    - **Gastric Emptying Times Chart**: Replaced static text placeholder in `science.html` with a fully responsive Y-axis SVG bar chart comparing gastric transit speeds (45 min vs. 15 min).
61: 3. **Dynamic Toast Notifications**:
62:    - Custom overlay toasts notify customers when adding items to the cart, switching currencies, or copying timelines.
63:    - Toasts feature interactive actions (e.g. clicking "View Cart" on an add-to-cart toast instantly slides the cart drawer open).
64: 4. **Live Search & Phase/Dietary Filtering**:
65:    - Search bar in `products.html` filters gels by name, flavor, and custom keyword attributes.
66:    - Phase filter buttons isolate gels by Prepare (Pre), Perform (During), and Recover (Post) phases.
67:    - Dietary toggle checkboxes filter by Caffeinated and Vegan formulas.
68: 5. **Timeline Copying & Print-Friendly Stylesheets**:
69:    - **Copy Plan**: Extracts the dynamic timeline points, formats them chronologically, and copies them to the system clipboard with toast confirmation.
70:    - **Print Plan**: Triggers `window.print()` to print/export the fueling schedule.
71:    - **Print stylesheet overrides**: A custom `@media print` block in both `css/style.css` and `css/pages.css` hides headers, footers, forms, checkouts, and **mobile navigation menus** (`.mobile-menu` / `#mobileMenu`) to deliver a clean, publication-ready timeline sheet.
72: 
73: ---
74: 
75: ## Technical & Sourcing Assets
76: 
77: - **PWA Offline Integration**:
78:   - [manifest.json](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/manifest.json): Declares application names, orientation, theme colors, and SVG app icon parameters.
79:   - [sw.js](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/sw.js): Caches all page assets locally on installation for complete offline operation.
80: - **Stylesheets**: 
81:   - [css/style.css](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/css/style.css): Holds custom CSS variables (including dark-mode variables), resets, layout grids, global header/footer, mobile menu sliders, toasts, and the cart drawer panels.
82:   - [css/pages.css](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/css/pages.css): Houses page-specific styling (hero alignments, custom FDA labels, timeline nodes, FAQ structures) and `@media print` rules.
83: - **Scripts**:
84:   - [js/main.js](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/js/main.js): Runs the central `localStorage` shopping cart engine, registers the Service Worker, handles theme/currency selections, generates dynamic WhatsApp & LINE checkouts, and renders dynamic toast notifications.
85:   - [js/calculator.js](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/js/calculator.js): Handles math calculators (finish times, sweat rate indices, target carbs/fluids), generates timelines, binds copy/print actions, and triggers bundle purchases.
86: 
87: ---
88:

---

## Phase 4: Brand Assets & Packaging Integration

We have successfully integrated the official brand assets:

1. **Brand Logo Integration**:
   - Replaced all inline SVG navigation logos with high-resolution brand logo images: `assets/logo-black.png` (light theme) and `assets/logo-white.png` (dark theme).
   - Designed a responsive CSS switcher for the logo: when dark mode is toggled, the logo automatically switches colors.
   - Added the white logo to the permanently dark global footer, establishing a cohesive premium identity.
2. **Product Packaging Integration (SUNRISE, STRIKE, SUNSET)**:
   - Replaced all gradient box placeholders across the site (Home page, Catalog, Details page, and Cart drawer thumbnails) with the actual sachet transparent PNG packaging images:
     - `assets/gel-sunrise.png` (Yellow brush style sachet)
     - `assets/gel-strike.png` (Red brush style sachet)
     - `assets/gel-sunset.png` (Purple brush style sachet)
   - Created interactive CSS classes (`.hero-gel-image`, `.journey-gel-image`, `.product-card-image`, and `.product-detail-image`) with subtle rotations, drop-shadows, and scaling zoom animations on hover to deliver a premium, responsive touch.
3. **PWA & Offline Integrity**:
   - Updated the service worker cache file list in `sw.js` and bumped cache version to `enerthai-v2` to cache the new logo and sachet images locally, ensuring they render perfectly when offline.

---

## Verification Steps (Phase 4 Updates)

1. **Verify Logo Rendering & Theme Toggling**:
   - Refresh the page and inspect the header. Confirm that the black EnerThai logo is displayed cleanly.
   - Click the Dark Mode toggle button. Verify that the logo instantly transitions to the white version.
   - Inspect the global footer. Verify that the white EnerThai logo is rendered on the dark background.

   - Go to [products.html](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/products.html) and check that each product card contains its respective sachet image instead of solid color gradients.
   - Click on a product card or go to [product.html?id=sunrise](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/product.html?id=sunrise). Confirm that the left visual gallery dynamically renders the correct high-res packaging image corresponding to the product.
3. **Verify Cart Drawer Thumbnails**:

To host your static website on **GitHub Pages**, follow these step-by-step instructions. 

Since all links, styles, scripts, assets, and service worker paths are set using **relative paths**, your site will work perfectly out-of-the-box in a GitHub Pages subdirectory.

---

### Step 1: Open the Local Folder
All your project files are situated in your local conversation directory:
👉 **[Open local project folder](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86)**

---

### Step 2: Create a New GitHub Repository
1. Go to [github.com](https://github.com) and log in.
2. Click the **"+"** icon in the top-right corner and select **New repository**.
3. Name your repository (e.g., `enerthai`).
4. Select **Public** (required for the free tier of GitHub Pages).
5. **Do not** add a README, `.gitignore`, or license.
6. Click **Create repository**.

---

### Step 3: Upload Your Files
You can upload the files using the Git command line or directly through GitHub's Web UI.

#### Option A: Using the Command Line (Recommended)
Open **PowerShell** or **Command Prompt** and run the following commands:

```bash
# 1. Navigate to the project directory
cd "C:\Users\Kaopan\.gemini\antigravity\brain\f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86"

# 2. Initialize a Git repository
git init

# 3. Add all files to staging
git add .

# 4. Commit the files
git commit -m "Initial commit with EnerThai assets and pages"

# 5. Rename default branch to main
git branch -M main

# 6. Add your GitHub remote origin (Replace with your actual GitHub URL)
git remote add origin https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/enerthai.git

# 7. Push files to GitHub
git push -u origin main
```

#### Option B: Using the Web UI
1. On your new repository page, click the link that says **"uploading an existing file"**.
2. Open your local project folder in File Explorer.
3. Drag and drop **all files and folders** (including `assets/`, `css/`, `js/`, `.html` files, `manifest.json`, and `sw.js`) into the upload area on GitHub.
4. Once loaded, click **Commit changes**.

---

### Step 4: Enable GitHub Pages
1. In your GitHub repository page, click the **Settings** tab at the top.
2. In the left sidebar, scroll down to the **Code and automation** section and click **Pages**.
3. Under **Build and deployment** -> **Source**, keep it set to **Deploy from a branch**.
4. Under **Branch**, select **main** (or `master`) and leave the directory path as **`/ (root)`**.
5. Click **Save**.

---

### Step 5: Visit Your Live Site!
GitHub will take about **1 to 2 minutes** to build and launch your site. 

Refresh the **Settings > Pages** page, and you will see a success banner showing your live URL at the top, formatted like:
👉 `https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/enerthai/`

Updating your live website is very straightforward. GitHub Pages automatically redeploys your site every time you push new commits or upload new changes.

Here is what you do depending on how you set up the repository:

---

### Method A: If you are using the Command Line (Easiest)
Whenever we make edits together, open your terminal (PowerShell or Command Prompt) and run:

```bash
# 1. Navigate to the project directory
cd "C:\Users\Kaopan\.gemini\antigravity\brain\f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86"

# 2. Stage the edited files
git add .

# 3. Commit the changes (describe the updates)
git commit -m "Updated website features"

# 4. Push to GitHub
git push origin main
```
GitHub Pages will automatically detect the new commit and rebuild the live site in under 60 seconds!

---

### Method B: If you are using the Web UI
1. Go to your repository on [github.com](https://github.com).
2. Click **Add file** (top right of the files list) and select **Upload files**.
3. Drag and drop the specific files we updated (e.g. `index.html` or `css/style.css`) from your [local folder](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86) into the page.
4. Click **Commit changes** to save.

This error (`InvalidDNSError`) occurs because GitHub Pages has been told to look for a custom domain (`www.enerthai.com`), but the Domain Name System (DNS) records for that domain are not yet pointing to GitHub's servers.

Here is how you can resolve it depending on your goals:

---

### Case 1: You do NOT own the domain `enerthai.com`
If you haven't bought `enerthai.com` yet and just want to view your site online for free:

1. Go to your repository **Settings** on GitHub.
2. Click **Pages** in the left sidebar.
3. Scroll down to the **Custom domain** section.
4. **Delete** `www.enerthai.com` from the input field and click **Save**.
5. Your site will instantly revert to the free default URL:
   👉 `https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/enerthai/`

---

### Case 2: You DO own `enerthai.com` and want to use it
If you have purchased the domain from a registrar (like GoDaddy, Namecheap, Google Domains, etc.), you need to configure the DNS settings at your registrar to point to GitHub.

Log in to your domain registrar's control panel, find the **DNS Management** section, and add the following records:

#### 1. Add Apex Domain A Records
Point the root domain `enerthai.com` to GitHub's IPs by creating four **A Records**:
* **Host / Name**: `@` 
* **Value / IP Address**: `185.199.108.153`
* **Host / Name**: `@` 
* **Value / IP Address**: `185.199.109.153`
* **Host / Name**: `@` 
* **Value / IP Address**: `185.199.110.153`
* **Host / Name**: `@` 
* **Value / IP Address**: `185.199.111.153`

#### 2. Add Subdomain CNAME Record
Point `www.enerthai.com` to your default GitHub Pages URL by creating a **CNAME Record**:
* **Host / Name**: `www`
* **Value / Target**: `YOUR_USERNAME.github.io` (make sure to replace `YOUR_USERNAME` with your actual GitHub username).

*Note: DNS changes can take anywhere from 10 minutes to a few hours to propagate globally. Once DNS is updated, go back to your GitHub Pages Settings, click **Save** on your custom domain, and check the **Enforce HTTPS** box once it becomes available.*

I've been inspecting the structure of these panels within the product cards, particularly for the "Sunrise (Prepare)" example. I'm taking a deep dive into how that's all built.


**Defining Nutrition Data Layout**

I've determined the ideal format should mirror the official US FDA-style nutrition label. This includes specific data points like serving size, calories, total fat with its sub-components, cholesterol, sodium, and total carbohydrates with breakdown of fiber and sugars, protein, and also essential minerals. I'm focusing on aligning the data structure with what we're fetching from the dynamic JavaScript. I'm noting the dynamic data population for each field to see how to incorporate the sub-components.


**Implementing Nutrition Updates**

I'm now focusing on implementing the fully detailed nutrition data within the `product.html` page.  I've updated the static HTML structure of `#nutritionPanel` to include all rows for the full set of nutrition information. I'm focusing on the JavaScript to populate the contents from `window.EnerThaiProducts`. I'll next calculate percentage DVs based on standard FDA references and insert them into the `product.html` script!


**Calculating DV Percentages**

I've just added the JavaScript functions to calculate and display the Daily Value (DV) percentages for sodium, carbs, fiber, protein, potassium, calcium, and Vitamin C. I'm focusing on the calculations and the data sources. Some products do not have values for protein, so, I have accounted for an absence of a DV calculation for some products.


**Updating Product List Displays**

I'm now integrating detailed nutrition information into the product card previews on `products.html`. I've updated the static collapsed panels for the "SUNRISE," "STRIKE," and "SUNSET" cards with the new nutrition data, ensuring accurate calorie, fat, sodium, carb, fiber, sugar, protein, and potassium values, as well as calcium and vitamin C, if applicable.


**Refining Calculator Logic**

I'm now investigating the `js/calculator.js` file to fine-tune the recommendation logic. I've been tracing the calculations related to `countStrike` and how total carbohydrate requirements are determined. I'm taking a close look at the calculations around line 170 to 195, particularly the pre- and post-race recommendations for Sunrise and Sunset gels, plus the Strike recommendation logic. It appears that the calculator recommends gels based on the total carbs needed during the race, and the specific carb values of each gel. I need to make sure this is accurate.


**Refining Carb Calculation Logic**

I'm now diving deeper into how the calculator determines carbohydrate needs, particularly focusing on how Sunrise, Strike, and Sunset gel carb counts are integrated. I'm focusing on the `js/calculator.js` file, specifically the `countStrike` calculation, to ensure the carb requirements are accurately factored in, including the adjustment based on duration and runner experience. I've updated the gel carb values in `js/main.js` and the text descriptions in `js/calculator.js`. I'm verifying the pre-race consumption impacts the total carbs needed during the run.


**Verifying Catalog Filters**

I'm now cross-referencing the filter attributes on `products.html` with the product data to ensure accurate filtering. I'm confirming caffeine and vegan tags match the nutritional profiles, including the recent updates. I have verified that caffeine filtering now accurately reflects each product's caffeine content.

args.CodeContent:
# Implementation Plan - Nutrition Facts & Product Database Update

Update the **EnerThai** product database, catalog grids, detailed pages, and fueling calculator outputs to match the newly provided nutrition and ingredient profiles.

---

## New Nutrition & Ingredient Specifications

### 1. SUNRISE (Prepare)
- **Flavor**: Mango & Banana
- **Caffeine**: 70mg (Caffeinated from green tea)
- **Energy**: 135 kcal
- **Carbohydrates**: 31g
- **Sugars**: 27g (0g added sugars)
- **Sodium**: 15mg (Natural from fruit, no added salt)
- **Potassium**: 250mg
- **Antioxidants**: Catechin from tea + Carotene from mango
- **Ingredients**: Natural Mango Puree, Natural Banana Puree, Water, Maltodextrin, Green Tea Extract (Caffeine), Citric Acid.

### 2. STRIKE (Perform)
- **Flavor**: Thai Coconut & Guava
- **Caffeine**: 0mg (Caffeine-free)
- **Energy**: 118 kcal
- **Carbohydrates**: 30g
- **Sugars**: 26g (0g added sugars)
- **Sodium**: 225mg (Thai sea salt)
- **Potassium**: 350mg
- **Calcium**: 40mg
- **Vitamin C**: 40mg (53% Thai RDI)
- **Ingredients**: Thai Coconut Water, Natural Guava Puree, Lime Juice, Sea Salt, Maltodextrin, Calcium Lactate, Ascorbic Acid (Vitamin C).

### 3. SUNSET (Recover)
- **Flavor**: Thai Forest Honey & Organic Pea Protein
- **Energy**: 117 kcal
- **Carbohydrates**: 23g
- **Sugars**: 20g (0g added sugars)
- **Protein**: 9g (from organic plant pea protein)
- **Sodium**: 25mg (no added salt)
- **Potassium**: 50mg (natural)
- **Ingredients**: Organic Plant-based Pea Protein, Thai Forest Honey, Water, Ginger Root Extract, Lemon Juice, Sea Salt.

---

## Proposed Changes

### Centralized Product Database
#### [MODIFY] [main.js](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/js/main.js)
- Update product descriptors, flavor strings, ingredients, and nutrition fields for `sunrise`, `strike`, and `sunset`.

---

### Catalog Grid Update
#### [MODIFY] [products.html](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/products.html)
- Swap filtering tags for Sunrise and Strike:
  - Sunrise: `data-caffeine="true"`, `data-keywords="mango banana yellow caffeine green tea prepare"`
  - Strike: `data-caffeine="false"`, `data-keywords="coconut guava lime sodium electrolytes vitamin c perform strike"`
- Update card descriptions, flavors, list items, and expanding accordion panels for **NUTRITION FACTS** and **INGREDIENTS** to reflect the new specifications.

---

### Detailed Product Layout & Dynamic Label Loader
#### [MODIFY] [product.html](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/product.html)
- Reformat the static `#nutritionPanel` HTML to match the English version of the standard FDA-style output (incorporating Saturated Fat, Trans Fat, Cholesterol, Dietary Fiber, Added Sugars, Calcium, and Vitamin C).
- Update the javascript loader script to dynamically populate all these fields and calculate % Daily Value (DV) percentages based on standard references (e.g. 2300mg Sodium, 275g Carbs, 28g Fiber, 50g Protein, 4700mg Potassium, 1300mg Calcium, 90mg Vitamin C).

---

### Calculator Timing & Timeline Update
#### [MODIFY] [calculator.js](file:///C:/Users/Kaopan/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f054b131-c7b5-44a1-91e6-977638858d86/js/calculator.js)
- Update the timeline HTML output blocks:
  - Sunrise node description: list `31g carbs` and `70mg caffeine`.
  - Sunset node description: list `23g carbs` and `9g pea protein`.
- Verify the math in the recommended bundle calculator works accurately with the updated sachet counts.

---

## Verification Plan

### Manual Verification
- Verify search & phase filtering widgets in `products.html` correctly display the new caffeine status (Sunrise shows up under "Caffeinated", Strike shows up under "Caffeine-free").
- Expand the Nutrition Facts panels on `products.html` and verify the values.
- Navigate to `product.html?id=strike`, `product.html?id=sunrise`, and `product.html?id=sunset` and check the FDA-styled nutrition facts panels for formatting accuracy and correct % DV math.
- Generate a fueling plan on `calculator.html` and verify that the generated timeline prints the updated specs.

args.CodeContent:
# Task List: EnerThai E-Commerce Website

- `[x]` Create directory structure and asset placeholders
- `[x]` Create core CSS stylesheets (`css/style.css` & `css/pages.css`)
- `[x]` Implement global JavaScript (`js/main.js`) for cart state & UI interactions
- `[x]` Build Home Page (`index.html`)
- `[x]` Build Products Catalog Page (`products.html`)
- `[x]` Build Dynamic Product Detail Page (`product.html`)
- `[x]` Build Fueling Calculator (`calculator.html` & `js/calculator.js`)
- `[x]` Build Our Story Page (`story.html`)
- `[x]` Build Science Page (`science.html`)
- `[x]` Build FAQ Page (`faq.html`)
- `[x]` Build Contact Page (`contact.html`)
- `[x]` Verify functionality, responsiveness, and performance
- `[x]` Generate walkthrough report

## Phase 2: Premium Enhancements
- `[x]` Create PWA files (`manifest.json` & `sw.js`) and register Service Worker in `js/main.js`
- `[x]` Add WhatsApp and LINE redirection buttons to Checkout Modal in `js/main.js` and `css/style.css`
- `[x]` Build Sweat Rate Calculator interface and equation mapping in `calculator.html` and `js/calculator.js`
- `[x]` Inject SEO Product Schema (JSON-LD) dynamically in `product.html`
- `[x]` Update walkthrough report & verify features

## Phase 3: Ultimate UX Polish
- `[x]` Implement global Currency Switcher (THB / USD) in `js/main.js` and navigation headers
- `[x]` Add "Copy Plan" clipboard generator and `@media print` style blocks for PDF prints in `calculator.html` & `js/calculator.js`
- `[x]` Implement Dark Mode toggle button & CSS custom variables in `css/style.css` & `js/main.js`
- `[x]` Add custom dynamic Toast Notification alerts to e-commerce events in `js/main.js` & `css/style.css`
- `[x]` Build search & phase filtering widgets in `products.html`
- `[x]` Revise walkthrough report & execute final checks

## Phase 4: Brand Assets & Packaging Integration
- `[x]` Create `assets` folder and copy/rename PNG assets
- `[x]` Update CSS styles for header logos and new packaging images in `css/style.css` and `css/pages.css`
- `[x]` Update header and footer logo markup in all 8 HTML files
- `[x]` Replace sachet placeholders on index.html, products.html, and product.html
- `[x]` Update dynamic product details sachet image swaps in `product.html` JavaScript
- `[x]` Update dynamic cart item sachet thumbnail rendering in `js/main.js`
- `[x]` Verify asset rendering, theme compatibility, and print layout, and update walkthrough.md

## Phase 5: Nutrition Database & FDA Label Updates
- `[ ]` Update central product database in `js/main.js` with new specifications
- `[ ]` Update filter tags and expander panels on `products.html`
- `[ ]` Update FDA-style static panel structure and loader logic in `product.html`
- `[ ]` Update calculator timeline strings in `js/calculator.js`
- `[ ]` Verify new nutrition filters, labels, and math, and update walkthrough.md

PREPARE (PRE-EXERCISE)

SUNRISE Energy Gel

Flavor: Mango & Banana

Pre-race caffeinated preparation to prime your muscles. Formulated with sweet mango puree and ripe banana puree, SUNRISE provides 31g of easily digestible carbohydrates. Infused with 70mg of natural green tea caffeine to boost mental focus.

  • 31g of fast and slow-release carbohydrates from real mango and banana
  • 70mg of natural caffeine from organic green tea extract for cognitive focus
  • Packed with natural Potassium (250mg) from bananas to prime fluid balance
  • Rich in tea catechins and mango carotene antioxidants

PERFORM (DURING ACTIVITY)

STRIKE Energy Gel

Flavor: Thai Coconut & Guava

High-speed carbohydrate and electrolyte absorption during intense exercise. Formulated with organic coconut water and pink guava puree, STRIKE delivers 30g of fast-absorbing carbohydrates. Caffeine-free and easy on the stomach.

  • 30g of dual-source carbohydrates (fructose-dominant ~1:0.7) for gut-friendly absorption
  • 225mg of clean Thai sea salt sodium to replenish lost sweat minerals
  • 350mg of Potassium and 40mg of Calcium from natural coconut and guava
  • 40mg of Vitamin C to reduce oxidative stress during heavy efforts
